'''鈭歵h-b-w-p''' ('''kathabwepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vousvoie|vousvoie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vousvoie|vousvoie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-b-w-p
|-
! Lemma
| kathabwepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
